title: flopster: the crucible
body:
A ModFest Mystery: this modpack is a preface to ModFest 1.21, held in Fall of 2024.

It contains a single world with a curious puzzle. Solving it will reward the wise with foreknowledge. Seek the miracle of the [FLOPSTER Drive](https://modrinth.com/mod/rochefort-mills). 

You win when you view the wicked beast. The beast wins when you look away.

WARNINGS:
- The solution to this puzzle is unabashedly stupid. You will recieve no hints.
- Solving this puzzle may spoil a surprise for ModFest 1.21 (Like we've been doing a good job keeping things under wraps anyways :P).
- Looking at the code may spoil the solution, but there's some interesting tech in there if that strikes your fancy.
